No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly or indirectly relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly or indirectly relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly or indirectly relates to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education, develops language skills for life/work (Target 4.4), and fosters cultural understanding and an international perspective (Target 4.7).
evidence: 培養學生具備日語聽、說、讀、寫、譯等五項在生活、工作所需之語言能力

Gender Equality.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly or indirectly relates to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly or indirectly relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly or indirectly relates to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops language skills for 'work' and 'professional competitiveness' (Target 8.5), and includes a unit on 'Looking for a part-time job'.
evidence: 生活、工作所需之語言能力
第6課アルバイトを探す

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly or indirectly relates to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Cultivating an 'international perspective' and 'international mobility' can foster cultural inclusion and facilitate people's mobility (Targets 10.2, 10.7).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Fostering understanding of 'Japanese society and historical culture' contributes to safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).
evidence: 知曉日本社會與歷史文化

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly or indirectly relates to consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly or indirectly relates to climate change or action.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly or indirectly relates to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course description or objectives directly or indirectly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Fostering 'Sino-Japanese cultural comparison' and an 'international perspective' can promote cross-cultural understanding, foundational for peace (related to Target 16.b).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Developing an 'international perspective' and 'international mobility' builds foundational skills for global cooperation and knowledge sharing (Targets 17.6, 17.9).
